title: Replace allorigins.win proxy provider with proxycroxy.io

requirements.summary: Replace allorigins.win with proxycroxy.io in the tab navigation hook
acceptanceCriteria: No references to allorigins.win remain in useTabs.ts
The proxy fallback chain uses https://proxycroxy.io as the provider
Proxied URLs are correctly constructed using https://proxycroxy.io

file_operations.description: Replace all occurrences of allorigins.win CORS proxy URL with https://proxycroxy.io in the proxy fallback chain and URL construction logic

requirements.summary: Replace allorigins.win with proxycroxy.io in tab and search components
acceptanceCriteria: No references to allorigins.win remain in TabContent.tsx or HomeSearch.tsx

file_operations.description: Replace any hardcoded allorigins.win proxy references with https://proxycroxy.io to ensure iframe proxy loading uses the updated provider
Replace any hardcoded allorigins.win proxy references with https://proxycroxy.io in the home search page iframe proxy loading logic

requirements.summary: Update proxy provider display in ProxyInfoPanel
acceptanceCriteria: No references to allorigins.win appear in the ProxyInfoPanel UI
The panel correctly displays https://proxycroxy.io as the proxy provider

file_operations.description: Update any displayed CORS proxy route descriptions or labels that reference allorigins.win to instead show https://proxycroxy.io
